full_load_all_help.stdout_head:
usage: full_load_all.py [-h] --start-date START_DATE --end-date END_DATE
                        --trade-date TRADE_DATE --ts-codes TS_CODES
                        --minute-ts-code MINUTE_TS_CODE
                        [--index-codes INDEX_CODES]
                        [--concept-codes CONCEPT_CODES]
                        [--industry-codes INDUSTRY_CODES]
                        [--holdertrade-ts-code HOLDERTRADE_TS_CODE]
                        [--holdertrade-ann-date HOLDERTRADE_ANN_DATE]

update_all_help.stdout_head:
usage: update_all.py [-h] --trade-date TRADE_DATE --start-date START_DATE
                     --end-date END_DATE --ts-codes TS_CODES
                     [--index-codes INDEX_CODES]
                     [--concept-codes CONCEPT_CODES]
                     [--industry-codes INDUSTRY_CODES]

Run all P0.9 incremental update jobs.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --trade-date, --date TRADE_DATE
  --start-date, --start START_DATE
  --end-date, --end END_DATE
  --t

run_scheduler_help.stdout_head:
usage: run_scheduler.py [-h] [--settings-path SETTINGS_PATH]

Run the P0.10 scheduler service.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --settings-path SETTINGS_PATH
